name: Minecraft
author: ops@refx.example
description: Minecraft: Java Edition. Pick your loader — Vanilla, Paper, Fabric, Forge or NeoForge — and any version, anytime.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
LOADER="${LOADER:-paper}"
MC_VER="${MINECRAFT_VERSION:-latest}"
LV="${LOADER_VERSION:-latest}"
JAR="${SERVER_JARFILE:-server.jar}"

write_props() {
  touch server.properties
  if grep -q '^server-port=' server.properties; then
    sed -i "s/^server-port=.*/server-port=${SERVER_PORT}/" server.properties
  else
    echo "server-port=${SERVER_PORT}" >> server.properties
  fi
  if [ "${EULA}" = "true" ]; then echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt; fi
}

# Fail loudly (with a dir listing) if the loader's launch artifact is missing or
# empty, so a broken install never boots into the cryptic JVM 'Unable to access
# jarfile' error. The names here MUST match the loader's startup command.
verify_launch() {
  case "$LOADER" in
    vanilla|paper) [ -s "$JAR" ] || { echo "FATAL: launch jar '$JAR' missing/empty after install" >&2; ls -la; exit 1; } ;;
    fabric) [ -s fabric-server-launch.jar ] || { echo 'FATAL: fabric-server-launch.jar missing/empty after install' >&2; ls -la; exit 1; } ;;
    forge|neoforge) { [ -s unix_args.txt ] && [ -f user_jvm_args.txt ]; } || { echo 'FATAL: forge/neoforge arg files (unix_args.txt/user_jvm_args.txt) missing after install' >&2; ls -la; exit 1; } ;;
  esac
}

case "$LOADER" in
  vanilla)
    MAN=https://launchermeta.mojang.com/mc/game/version_manifest_v2.json
    if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL "$MAN" | jq -r '.latest.release'); fi
    URL=$(curl -fsSL "$MAN" | jq -r --arg v "$MC_VER" '.versions[] | select(.id==$v) | .url')
    if [ -z "$URL" ]; then echo "Unknown Minecraft version ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; fi
    SRV=$(curl -fsSL "$URL" | jq -r '.downloads.server.url')
    curl -fsSL -o "$JAR" "$SRV"
    echo "Installed Vanilla ${MC_VER}"
    ;;
  paper)
    UA='User-Agent: ReFx-Hosting'
    if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL https://launchermeta.mojang.com/mc/game/version_manifest_v2.json | jq -r '.latest.release'); fi
    # Prefer the current PaperMC v3 (fill) API for the newest build; fall back to the legacy v2 API.
    DL=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://fill.papermc.io/v3/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VER}/builds/latest" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.downloads."server:default".url // empty')
    if [ -z "$DL" ]; then
      BUILD=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VER}/builds" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.builds[-1].build // empty')
      [ -n "$BUILD" ] && DL="https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VER}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/paper-${MC_VER}-${BUILD}.jar"
    fi
    # If Paper has no build for the newest MC release yet, fall back to Paper's newest supported version.
    if [ -z "$DL" ]; then
      MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper | jq -r '.versions[-1]')
      BUILD=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VER}/builds" | jq -r '.builds[-1].build')
      DL="https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VER}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/paper-${MC_VER}-${BUILD}.jar"
    fi
    [ -z "$DL" ] && { echo "No Paper build found for ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; }
    curl -fsSL -o "$JAR" "$DL"
    echo "Installed Paper ${MC_VER}"
    ;;
  fabric)
    if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/game | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version'); fi
    if [ "$LV" = "latest" ] || [ "$LV" = "recommended" ]; then LV=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version'); fi
    INST=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/installer | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version')
    echo "Installing Fabric: minecraft=${MC_VER} loader=${LV} installer=${INST}"
    if ! curl -fsSL -o fabric-server-launch.jar "https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader/${MC_VER}/${LV}/${INST}/server/jar"; then
      echo "Fabric loader ${LV} unavailable for ${MC_VER}; falling back to latest stable" >&2
      LV=$(curl -fsSL "https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader/${MC_VER}" | jq -r '[.[] | select(.loader.stable==true)][0].loader.version')
      [ -z "$LV" ] && { echo "No Fabric loader for ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; }
      curl -fsSL -o fabric-server-launch.jar "https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader/${MC_VER}/${LV}/${INST}/server/jar"
    fi
    echo "Installed Fabric ${MC_VER} (loader ${LV})"
    ;;
  forge)
    if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then
      MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/promotions_slim.json | jq -r '.promos | keys[]' | sed -E 's/-(recommended|latest)$//' | sort -V -u | tail -n 1)
    fi
    if [ "$LV" = "latest" ] || [ "$LV" = "recommended" ]; then
      P=$(curl -fsSL https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/promotions_slim.json)
      LV=$(echo "$P" | jq -r --arg k "${MC_VER}-recommended" '.promos[$k] // empty')
      [ -z "$LV" ] && LV=$(echo "$P" | jq -r --arg k "${MC_VER}-latest" '.promos[$k] // empty')
      [ -z "$LV" ] && { echo "No Forge build for ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; }
    fi
    FULL="${MC_VER}-${LV}"
    echo "Installing Forge ${FULL}"
    if ! curl -fsSL -o forge-installer.jar "https://maven.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/${FULL}/forge-${FULL}-installer.jar"; then
      ALT="${MC_VER}-${LV#${MC_VER}-}"
      echo "Forge ${FULL} not found; retrying as ${ALT}" >&2
      FULL="$ALT"
      curl -fsSL -o forge-installer.jar "https://maven.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/${FULL}/forge-${FULL}-installer.jar"
    fi
    java -jar forge-installer.jar --installServer
    rm -f forge-installer.jar forge-installer.jar.log
    [ -f user_jvm_args.txt ] || echo '# Xmx/Xms supplied by the panel' > user_jvm_args.txt
    A=$(find libraries -type f -name unix_args.txt | head -n1); [ -z "$A" ] && { echo 'unix_args.txt missing' >&2; exit 1; }; cp "$A" unix_args.txt
    echo "Installed Forge ${FULL}"
    ;;
  neoforge)
    META=$(curl -fsSL https://maven.neoforged.net/releases/net/neoforged/neoforge/maven-metadata.xml)
    ALL=$(echo "$META" | grep -oE '<version>[^<]+</version>' | sed -E 's/<\/?version>//g')
    if [ "$LV" = "latest" ] || [ "$LV" = "recommended" ]; then
      if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then
        LV=$(echo "$ALL" | grep -v -- '-beta' | tail -n 1); [ -z "$LV" ] && LV=$(echo "$ALL" | tail -n 1)
      else
        PFX=$(echo "$MC_VER" | sed -E 's/^1\.([0-9]+)(\.([0-9]+))?$/\1.\3/; s/\.$/.0/')
        LV=$(echo "$ALL" | grep -E "^${PFX}\." | grep -v -- '-beta' | tail -n 1 || true)
        [ -z "$LV" ] && LV=$(echo "$ALL" | grep -E "^${PFX}\." | tail -n 1 || true)
      fi
      [ -z "$LV" ] && { echo "No NeoForge build for ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; }
    fi
    echo "Installing NeoForge ${LV} (Minecraft ${MC_VER})"
    curl -fsSL -o neoforge-installer.jar "https://maven.neoforged.net/releases/net/neoforged/neoforge/${LV}/neoforge-${LV}-installer.jar"
    java -jar neoforge-installer.jar --installServer
    rm -f neoforge-installer.jar neoforge-installer.jar.log
    [ -f user_jvm_args.txt ] || echo '# Xmx/Xms supplied by the panel' > user_jvm_args.txt
    A=$(find libraries -type f -name unix_args.txt | head -n1); [ -z "$A" ] && { echo 'unix_args.txt missing' >&2; exit 1; }; cp "$A" unix_args.txt
    echo "Installed NeoForge ${LV}"
    ;;
  *) echo "Unknown loader ${LOADER}" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

write_props
verify_launch
ls -la
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.description: Server software: vanilla, paper, fabric, forge or neoforge.
Minecraft version to install. Use "latest" for the newest release.
Runtime jar (vanilla/paper). Fabric uses fabric-server-launch.jar automatically.
Maximum Java heap size in megabytes (-Xmx).
You must accept the Mojang EULA to run a server.

longDescription: One Minecraft, every loader. Deploy Vanilla, Paper, Fabric, Forge or NeoForge and switch between them — or change the exact version — whenever you like, right from the panel.
